description_long: This is a sleek, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a striking black and red color scheme accented by a vibrant, abstract pattern along the sides. The wings are straight and low-mounted, with red tips and a subtle dihedral angle, giving the aircraft a dynamic appearance. The nose features a prominent red spinner and a three-blade propeller, while the cockpit is positioned just ahead of the wing root and appears to be enclosed with a clear canopy. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all edged in red. The landing gear is in a taildragger configuration, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The overall design suggests a classic, agile aircraft suitable for aerobatics or display.
description: A black and red single-propeller airplane with a low-mounted wing, enclosed cockpit, and taildragger landing gear, featuring vibrant side graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red spinner, three-blade propeller, and wide, straight wings with red tips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the abstract red and blue pattern on the fuselage and the low-mounted wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with red-edged stabilizers and the tail wheel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit canopy, propeller, and the continuation of the side graphics.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings, slight dihedral angle, and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single piston engine with a three-blade propeller mounted at the nose.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear under the wings and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single-seat.
